decoder_heading: We want you to be able to use all Palmsoft apps as privately as possible
ident_heading: We want you to be able to use all Palmsoft apps as privately as possible
heading_content_part: We want you to be able to use all Palmsoft apps as privately as possible.

decoder_heading: All apps of Palmsoft collect no sensitive personal information
ident_heading: All apps of Palmsoft collect no sensitive personal information
heading_content_part: All apps of Palmsoft collect no sensitive personal information like phone number, credit card number, home address and the like.

decoder_heading: Even if you buy something using in-app purchases
ident_heading: Even if you buy something using in-app purchases
heading_content_part: Even if you buy something using in-app purchases, we never receive any personal or financial details, as this is all managed by Google Play.However, many Android devices behave differently, and everybody wants an app that works on his device too, so we are collecting both crash-reports and usage data of the apps.

decoder_heading: For example, if we receive a crash
ident_heading: For example, if we receive a crash
heading_content_part: For example, if we receive a crash, we can seewhat events happened before (e.g. the user pressed a certain button, or the app woke up from sleep)the version of the app, so maybe it only happened on an old versionthe country of the incident (some crashes are language dependent!)a device fingerprint consisting of hardware information.

decoder_heading: All these information is shared with
ident_heading: All these information is shared with
heading_content_part: All these information is shared withno third partyand isnot used for advertisment.

decoder_heading: Additionally, in order to help you recover your account
ident_heading: Additionally, in order to help you recover your account
heading_content_part: Additionally, in order to help you recover your account and to prevent abuse of the apps by trolls, hackers, bots or spammers, we collect information about your hardware, including a device fingerprint and yourgoogle account’s primary account information (email address) or your amazon-id.

decoder_heading: These information are never shared with other users of the app
ident_heading: These information are never shared with other users of the app
heading_content_part: These information are never shared with other users of the app or any third parties, and are solely used for administration.

decoder_heading: All in-app advertisement is managed by AdMob (Google)
ident_heading: All in-app advertisement is managed by AdMob (Google)
heading_content_part: All in-app advertisement is managed by AdMob (Google). If you want to know more about their data usage, visitGoogle’s privacy policy page.

decoder_heading: The PRO versions of Palmsoft apps don’t use any in-app advertisements
ident_heading: The PRO versions of Palmsoft apps don’t use any in-app advertisements
heading_content_part: The PRO versions of Palmsoft apps don’t use any in-app advertisements.
